name: Flat Baseball
author: Poki
description: Flat Baseball is an one-tap baseball game where flat, cartoony characters battle it out across time! Start in Suburbia, then swing your way through Spooky Forests, Ancient Egypt, prehistoric caves, and even the future against robots. Smash balls, defeat quirky enemies, and survive the madness of Crazy Innings. Ready to hit home runs through history? How to play Flat Baseball? Click or tap to play! Who created Flat Baseball? Flat Baseball is created by 10x10 Games. Play their other game on Poki: Wacky Doodle Fixes , Basket Swooshes , Free Kick Screamers , footy-zag Detective Loupe Puzzle and Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 ! How can I play Flat Baseball for free? You can play Flat Baseball for free on Poki. Can I play Flat Baseball on mobile devices and desktop? Flat Baseball can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
